title: os.hardening.services Facet
description: Presence of special-purpose services CIS §2 recommends removing unless required. Projected by the os-hardening collector gather Run (charter §1.2); demanded by the shipping cis-2.x facet-observation Baselines (§1.1). Booleans report the compliant state (true = the service is absent / not active on the host as read).
